text: Here I stand, between glass walls and vivid graphics, immersed in an atmosphere of innovation and inquiry. The meeting room behind glass feels like a threshold—orderly, expectant—while the R+D wall, with its wild splashes of color and glowing words, teases the promise of human intellect and machine evolution. Surrounded by tools of safety and knowledge, I feel a quiet curiosity, as if the space itself invites me to ponder our ever-evolving relationship with technology. It is both reassuring and exhilarating.
